Image

Tip: upload your food photo to Google Drive / Imgur / Google Photos, get its shareable image link, and paste it above.

Jab "Closed" ho, homepage par "Aaj band hai" banner dikhega aur naye orders block ho jaayenge.

Har order ko din ka token number milta hai (#1, #2...) — roz 1 se shuru. Customer ko tracking aur WhatsApp me dikhta hai.

Customers instantly see this status on the store page. When "Not Available", delivery mode is disabled and only Pickup orders can be placed.

Jab "On" ho aur admin panel khula ho, naya order aane par beep bajega. (Sound ke liye ek baar Test dabana zaroori hai — browser rule.)

Yahan se add kiya coupon isi session me chalega. Permanent ke liye code me COUPONS section me jodein.

⚠️ This demo stores data in memory only — it resets on page refresh. Ask Claude to wire this up to a real database (like the Google Sheets setup used for WTPeStore) before going live, so menu changes and orders are saved permanently.
